name: Crockery Pot Old-Fashioned Vege/Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Corn (10.5 oz), drained or Frozen Corn
3 Baking Potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Pound Boneless Beef Chuck or Round Steak - trimmed of fat, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart electric crockery-cooker, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir to mix well.
3. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 8 to 9 hours, or until meat is tender.
